2336320.name: DUCK: Dangerous Ultimate Cartridge Kidnapper Soundtrack
2336320.description:
An incredibly groovy and varied soundtrack for the game! Includes 70 music tracks by Darkman007, RWG, Serene Rase (Plegaci), Mardar, see u in the spring and SallyChaseXD in MP3. The soundtrack includes only original tunes recorded specifically for D.U.C.K.!

Bonus: some unused tracks and different cover-arts! Two tracks (How much is 8-bit and 5462) are included in the soundtrack with permission of the authors. Enjoy listening!
